criteria_verification.criterion_text: Test fixture `greenfield_brief_pipeline` brings up: a fake
criteria_verification.evidence: Implemented `greenfield_brief_pipeline` pytest fixture that assembles a `GreenfieldBriefPipeline` harness composing: FakeSpecialistRegistry pre-populated with PRODUCT_OWNER + ARCHITECT specialists, FakeGuardkitSubprocessEngine with canned artefact paths for system-arch/system-design/feature-spec/feature-plan, FakeStageLogStore as the in-memory SQLite-shaped store implementing the three reader Protocols (StageOrderingGuard.StageLogReader, PerFeatureLoopSequencer.StageLogReader, Supervisor.StageLogTurnRecorder), and FakeApprovalChannel(auto_approve=True). TestGreenfieldBriefPipelineFixture verifies each collaborator is wired correctly.
criteria_verification.notes: Implemented `greenfield_brief_pipeline` pytest fixture that assembles a `GreenfieldBriefPipeline` harness composing: FakeSpecialistRegistry pre-populated with PRODUCT_OWNER + ARCHITECT specialists, FakeGuardkitSubprocessEngine with canned artefact paths for system-arch/system-design/feature-spec/feature-plan, FakeStageLogStore as the in-memory SQLite-shaped store implementing the three reader Protocols (StageOrderingGuard.StageLogReader, PerFeatureLoopSequencer.StageLogReader, Supervisor.StageLogTurnRecorder), and FakeApprovalChannel(auto_approve=True). TestGreenfieldBriefPipelineFixture verifies each collaborator is wired correctly.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Smoke test: queue one-line brief, drive supervisor turns until
criteria_verification.evidence: TestMinimalGreenfieldSmoke.test_smoke_pauses_at_pull_request_review drives drive_until_paused on a single-feature catalogue and asserts the final TurnReport's chosen_stage is PULL_REQUEST_REVIEW. test_smoke_records_mandatory_human_gate_mode_and_pr_url asserts the terminal chronology row carries gate_mode='mandatory_human' and a populated pr_url field beginning with 'https://github.com/example/forge/pull/'. SMOKE_BRIEF is a one-line string ('Build a small greeting CLI...') and test_smoke_one_line_brief_is_threaded_through_harness asserts no newline in the brief.
criteria_verification.notes: TestMinimalGreenfieldSmoke.test_smoke_pauses_at_pull_request_review drives drive_until_paused on a single-feature catalogue and asserts the final TurnReport's chosen_stage is PULL_REQUEST_REVIEW. test_smoke_records_mandatory_human_gate_mode_and_pr_url asserts the terminal chronology row carries gate_mode='mandatory_human' and a populated pr_url field beginning with 'https://github.com/example/forge/pull/'. SMOKE_BRIEF is a one-line string ('Build a small greeting CLI...') and test_smoke_one_line_brief_is_threaded_through_harness asserts no newline in the brief.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Smoke test asserts `stage_log` contains the eight-stage chain in
criteria_verification.evidence: TestMinimalGreenfieldSmoke.test_smoke_chronology_lists_eight_canonical_stages_in_order extracts chosen_stage from every DISPATCHED chronology row and asserts equality with CANONICAL_STAGE_ORDER tuple (PRODUCT_OWNER → ARCHITECT → SYSTEM_ARCH → SYSTEM_DESIGN → FEATURE_SPEC → FEATURE_PLAN → AUTOBUILD → PULL_REQUEST_REVIEW). test_smoke_dispatches_each_dispatcher_exactly_once additionally verifies each dispatcher was called exactly the expected number of times (2 specialist + 4 subprocess + 1 autobuild + 1 PR-review).
criteria_verification.notes: TestMinimalGreenfieldSmoke.test_smoke_chronology_lists_eight_canonical_stages_in_order extracts chosen_stage from every DISPATCHED chronology row and asserts equality with CANONICAL_STAGE_ORDER tuple (PRODUCT_OWNER → ARCHITECT → SYSTEM_ARCH → SYSTEM_DESIGN → FEATURE_SPEC → FEATURE_PLAN → AUTOBUILD → PULL_REQUEST_REVIEW). test_smoke_dispatches_each_dispatcher_exactly_once additionally verifies each dispatcher was called exactly the expected number of times (2 specialist + 4 subprocess + 1 autobuild + 1 PR-review).

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Degraded test: same harness with empty specialist registry; assert
criteria_verification.evidence: TestNoSpecialistsDegradedPath has three tests using the same `greenfield_brief_pipeline` fixture but mutating registry.healthy.clear() before driving. test_degraded_flags_product_owner_for_review asserts dispatch_result['status']=='flagged_for_review' for the product-owner turn. test_degraded_records_flag_for_review_with_degraded_rationale asserts the chronology row carries gate_mode='flag_for_review' and the rationale contains 'degraded'. test_degraded_does_not_dispatch_architect asserts specialist_dispatcher.calls is exactly [PRODUCT_OWNER] (never ARCHITECT) and subprocess/autobuild/pr_review_gate were never invoked.
criteria_verification.notes: TestNoSpecialistsDegradedPath has three tests using the same `greenfield_brief_pipeline` fixture but mutating registry.healthy.clear() before driving. test_degraded_flags_product_owner_for_review asserts dispatch_result['status']=='flagged_for_review' for the product-owner turn. test_degraded_records_flag_for_review_with_degraded_rationale asserts the chronology row carries gate_mode='flag_for_review' and the rationale contains 'degraded'. test_degraded_does_not_dispatch_architect asserts specialist_dispatcher.calls is exactly [PRODUCT_OWNER] (never ARCHITECT) and subprocess/autobuild/pr_review_gate were never invoked.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Tests use the existing `FakeClock` pattern from
criteria_verification.evidence: Module imports `FakeClock` directly from `forge.pipeline` (re-exported from `src/forge/pipeline/__init__.py`). The `greenfield_brief_pipeline` fixture instantiates a FakeClock() and threads it onto the harness via `clock=FakeClock()`. TestGreenfieldBriefPipelineFixture.test_fake_clock_pattern_is_wired asserts `isinstance(pipeline.clock, FakeClock)` and `pipeline.clock.now() == 0.0`, demonstrating the canonical pattern is wired and ready for downstream timing-sensitive integrations.
criteria_verification.notes: Module imports `FakeClock` directly from `forge.pipeline` (re-exported from `src/forge/pipeline/__init__.py`). The `greenfield_brief_pipeline` fixture instantiates a FakeClock() and threads it onto the harness via `clock=FakeClock()`. TestGreenfieldBriefPipelineFixture.test_fake_clock_pattern_is_wired asserts `isinstance(pipeline.clock, FakeClock)` and `pipeline.clock.now() == 0.0`, demonstrating the canonical pattern is wired and ready for downstream timing-sensitive integrations.

rationale: All quality gates passed. Tests not required for this task type. All acceptance criteria met. Architecture context: 263 chars provided.
